title: Sinners.
content:
Sinners confounded are a twofold way,
    Either as when, the learned schoolmen say,
    Men's sins destroyed are when they repent,
    Or when, for sins, men suffer punishment.
meaning:
"Sinners." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
